title: Trump threatens Iran with '1000 missiles' as both sides shoot their mouth in Gulf spat
summary_full: President Trump threatened Iran with massive missile strikes if assassination plots are pursued. This warning dramatically escalated tensions between the two nations. Disagreements over a maritime deal's interpretation fueled renewed military exchanges. Iran vowed revenge for past actions and perceived US treaty violations. Ambiguity and mistrust now threaten another fragile understanding between them.
